languages.text: {n}Лицо Иждрига становится темным. Вы не слышите, а скорее ощущаете всем телом его низкое рычание.{/n} "Я договорюсь с Иокастой Заурбэк о совместных учениях. Мы покажем им что такое страх и слабость".

{n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel, rather than hear, his low growl through your whole body.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."
languages.original_text: {n}Лицо Иждрига становится темным. Вы не слышите, а скорее ощущаете всем телом его низкое рычание.{/n} "Я договорюсь с Иокастой Заурбэк о совместных учениях. Мы покажем им что такое страх и слабость".

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel his low growl with your whole body rather than hear it.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."

{n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel, rather than hear, his low growl through your whole body.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."
"If you believe that, then why bring us here with you? Or does the utility of our lasguns outweigh our weakness?"

{n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel his low growl with your whole body rather than hear it.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."

{n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel, rather than hear, his low growl through your whole body.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."

languages.text: 「そう思っているなら、なぜ私たちを連れてきたのですか？それとも、私たちのラスガンが私たちの弱さを上回るのですか？」
languages.original_text: "If you believe that, then why bring us here with you? Or does the utility of our lasguns outweigh our weakness?"

languages.text: {n}İzdrig'in yüzü kararıyor. Alçak hırlamasını duymaktan ziyade tüm vücudunuzda hissediyorsun.{/n} "Ortak tatbikatları Jocasta Sauerback ile konuşacağım. Onlara korkunun ve zayıflığın ne anlama geldiğini göstereceğiz."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel, rather than hear, his low growl through your whole body.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig'in yüzü kararıyor. Alçak hırlamasını duymaktan ziyade tüm vücudunuzda hissediyorsun.{/n} "Ortak tatbikatları Jocasta Sauerback ile konuşacağım. Onlara korkunun ve zayıflığın ne anlama geldiğini göstereceğiz."

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格的脸色阴沉下来，你并没有听到他的低吼，但你的整个身体可以感知到。{/n}“我会去跟约卡斯塔·苏尔贝克谈谈联合演练的事。我们会让他们明白什么叫恐惧，什么叫软弱。”
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel, rather than hear, his low growl through your whole body.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊兹德里格的脸色阴沉下来，你并没有听到他的低吼，但你的整个身体可以感知到。{/n}“我会去跟约卡斯塔·苏尔贝克谈谈联合演练的事。我们会让他们明白什么叫恐惧，什么叫软弱。”

languages.text: {n}Izdrigs Miene verfinstert sich. Du kannst sein tiefes Knurren in deinem gesamten Körper spüren.{/n} "Ich werde mit Jocasta Sauerback über gemeinsame Übungen sprechen. Wir werden ihnen zeigen, was Angst und Schwäche sind."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel, rather than hear, his low growl through your whole body.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrigs Miene verfinstert sich. Du kannst sein tiefes Knurren in deinem gesamten Körper spüren.{/n} "Ich werde mit Jocasta Sauerback über gemeinsame Übungen sprechen. Wir werden ihnen zeigen, was Angst und Schwäche sind."

languages.text: {n}Le visage d'Izdrig s'assombrit. Vous ressentez sa fureur parcourir votre corps.{/n} « J'aborderai le sujet des manœuvres conjointes avec Jocasta Sauerback. Nous leur montrerons ce que sont la peur et la faiblesse. »
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel, rather than hear, his low growl through your whole body.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage d'Izdrig s'assombrit. Vous ressentez sa fureur parcourir votre corps.{/n} « J'aborderai le sujet des manœuvres conjointes avec Jocasta Sauerback. Nous leur montrerons ce que sont la peur et la faiblesse. »

languages.text: {n}El rostro de Izdrig se ensombrece. Sientes, más que oyes, un gruñido grave que hace vibrar todo tu cuerpo.{/n} «Hablaré con Jocasta Sauerback sobre realizar entrenamientos conjuntos. Les enseñaremos el significado del miedo y la debilidad».
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig's face darkens. You feel, rather than hear, his low growl through your whole body.{/n} "I will speak with Jocasta Sauerback about joint drills. We'll show them the meaning of fear and weakness."

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro de Izdrig se ensombrece. Sientes, más que oyes, un gruñido grave que hace vibrar todo tu cuerpo.{/n} «Hablaré con Jocasta Sauerback sobre realizar entrenamientos conjuntos. Les enseñaremos el significado del miedo y la debilidad».
